REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-18-2020 -- APPEARANCE ONLY BY ROGER JACKSON, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. -- THE COURT ORDERS THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AT TRIAL CALL. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSION OF TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED - DEFENDANT APPEARED TO OPPOSE THE MOTION AFTER IT WAS CALLED FOR HEARING. HE HAD BEEN WAITING IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE COURT INTENDS TO CONTINUE THE MOTION TO OCTOBER 22, 2019 AND DEFENDANT SHALL NOTIFY THE PLAINTIFF OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE BY EMAIL, WHICH WILL BE COPIED TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Dismissal - No Appearance

Plaintiff'S Motion For Admissionof Proof Of Facts (Continued From 9/24/19 To 10/22/19 Per Jpt Stein - Email Dated 9/25/19)
Off Calendar Oct-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Steve Levy of Law Office of Steve Levy t: 800.637.6922 for Plaintiff; no other appearances.

RULING - ARGUED, Plaintiff'S Motion For Admission of Proof Of Facts is unopposed and granted.Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge:steven stein; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (jpt/302).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Set For Trial On Feb-18-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order That Matters In Req. For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roger E. Jackson, Esq. of the L/O of Roger Jackson, T:707.318.2997, for plaintiff and moving party;
Eduardo Monteagudo, Jr., defendant appearing on his own behalf, appeared late.

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem; only plaintiff's counsel signed the stipulation.

RULING: Defendant appeared to oppose the motion after it was called for hearing. He had been waiting in Department 302. The Court intends to continue the motion to October 22, 2019 and defendant shall notify the plaintiff of the continued hearing date by email, which will be copied to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
